  'headline': 'A. O. Smith Faces Flat Sales And Softer Returns On Capital',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'A. O. Smith, NYSE:AOS, has faced end market challenges that have '

  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'Madison Mid Cap Fund has initiated a new position in A. O. Smith '

  'headline': 'A. O. Smith (AOS): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?',
  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'Over the last six months, A. O. Smith’s shares have sunk to '
